'''鈭歯g-n-th''' ('''nganatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ecdyse|ecdyse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-n-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ecdyse|ecdyse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-n-th
|-
! Lemma
| nganatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nganathithi|nganathithi]] || [[word:nganathiji|nganathiji]] || [[word:nganathishi|nganathishi]] || [[word:nganathi|nganathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nganathuthuth|nganathuthuth]] || [[word:nganathujuj|nganathujuj]] || [[word:nganathushush|nganathushush]] || [[word:nganath|nganath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nganathuthu|nganathuthu]] || [[word:nganathuju|nganathuju]] || [[word:nganathushu|nganathushu]] || [[word:nganathu|nganathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nganathufuth|nganathufuth]] || [[word:nganathufuj|nganathufuj]] || [[word:nganathufush|nganathufush]] || [[word:nganathuf|nganathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nganathethe|nganathethe]] || [[word:nganatheje|nganatheje]] || [[word:nganatheshe|nganatheshe]] || [[word:nganathe|nganathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nganathothoth|nganathothoth]] || [[word:nganathojoj|nganathojoj]] || [[word:nganathoshosh|nganathoshosh]] || [[word:nganath|nganath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nganathotho|nganathotho]] || [[word:nganathojo|nganathojo]] || [[word:nganathosho|nganathosho]] || [[word:nganatho|nganatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nganathofoth|nganathofoth]] || [[word:nganathofoj|nganathofoj]] || [[word:nganathofosh|nganathofosh]] || [[word:nganathof|nganathof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nganath忙th忙|nganath忙th忙]] || [[word:nganath忙j忙|nganath忙j忙]] || [[word:nganath忙sh忙|nganath忙sh忙]] || [[word:nganath忙|nganath忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nganathathath|nganathathath]] || [[word:nganathajaj|nganathajaj]] || [[word:nganathashash|nganathashash]] || [[word:nganath|nganath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nganathatha|nganathatha]] || [[word:nganathaja|nganathaja]] || [[word:nganathasha|nganathasha]] || [[word:nganatha|nganatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nganathafath|nganathafath]] || [[word:nganathafaj|nganathafaj]] || [[word:nganathafash|nganathafash]] || [[word:nganathaf|nganathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nganathasha|nganathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonganathasha|gonganathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinganathasha|gokinganathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nganathn眉sha|nganathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonganathnkn眉sha|gonganathnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinganathn眉sha|gokinganathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nganathsh毛sha|nganathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonganathnksh毛sha|gonganathnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinganathsh毛sha|gokinganathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nganathrosha|nganathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonganathnkrosha|gonganathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinganathrosha|gokinganathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nganathmusha|nganathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonganathnkmusha|gonganathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinganathmusha|gokinganathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nganathsherasha|nganathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonganathnksherasha|gonganathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinganathsherasha|gokinganathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nganathngasha|nganathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonganathnkngasha|gonganathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinganathngasha|gokinganathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nganathyasha|nganathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonganathnkyasha|gonganathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinganathyasha|gokinganathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nganathyamasha|nganathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonganathnkyamasha|gonganathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinganathyamasha|gokinganathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nganathn眉sh毛sha|nganathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonganathnkn眉sh毛sha|gonganathnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinganathn眉sh毛sha|gokinganathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nganathn眉rosha|nganathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonganathnkn眉rosha|gonganathnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinganathn眉rosha|gokinganathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nganathn眉musha|nganathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonganathnkn眉musha|gonganathnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinganathn眉musha|gokinganathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nganathsh毛n眉sha|nganathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonganathnksh毛n眉sha|gonganathnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinganathsh毛n眉sha|gokinganathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nganathsh毛rosha|nganathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonganathnksh毛rosha|gonganathnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinganathsh毛rosha|gokinganathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nganathsh毛musha|nganathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonganathnksh毛musha|gonganathnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinganathsh毛musha|gokinganathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nganathron眉sha|nganathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonganathnkron眉sha|gonganathnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinganathron眉sha|gokinganathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nganathrosh毛sha|nganathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonganathnkrosh毛sha|gonganathnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinganathrosh毛sha|gokinganathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nganathromusha|nganathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonganathnkromusha|gonganathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinganathromusha|gokinganathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nganathmun眉sha|nganathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonganathnkmun眉sha|gonganathnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinganathmun眉sha|gokinganathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nganathmush毛sha|nganathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonganathnkmush毛sha|gonganathnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinganathmush毛sha|gokinganathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nganathmurosha|nganathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonganathnkmurosha|gonganathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinganathmurosha|gokinganathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nganath|nganath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙n忙th|ng忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honganath|honganath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙n忙th|hong忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonganath|hohonganath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙n忙th|hohong忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉nganath|n眉nganath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙n忙th|n眉ng忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉nganath|n眉n眉nganath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙n忙th|n眉n眉ng忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂nganath|n茂nganath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙n忙th|n茂ng忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂nganath|n茂n茂nganath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙n忙th|n茂n茂ng忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunganath|lunganath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙n忙th|lung忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunganath|lulunganath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙n忙th|lulung忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linganath|linganath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙n忙th|ling忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinganath|lilinganath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙n忙th|liling忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konganath|konganath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙n忙th|kong忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonganath|kokonganath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙n忙th|kokong忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenganath|kenganath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙n忙th|keng忙n忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenganath|kekenganath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙n忙th|kekeng忙n忙th]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
